# GitHub Labels тАУ Sandra Loo

Create these labels in the GitHub repository Settings тЖТ Labels.

## Type labels

| Label           | Color   | Description                     |
| --------------- | ------- | ------------------------------- |
| `type:feature`  | `#0075ca` | New feature or enhancement    |
| `type:bug`      | `#d73a4a` | Something isn't working        |
| `type:chore`    | `#e4e669` | Maintenance, tooling, refactor |
| `type:docs`     | `#cfd3d7` | Documentation changes          |

## Area labels

| Label          | Color   | Description                     |
| -------------- | ------- | ------------------------------- |
| `area:map`     | `#006b75` | Map and location features      |
| `area:game`    | `#5319e7` | Game module                    |
| `area:data`    | `#f9d0c4` | Data import and pipeline       |
| `area:api`     | `#0e8a16` | Server API routes               |
| `area:auth`    | `#e99695` | Authentication and users       |
| `area:admin`   | `#1d76db` | Admin panel                    |
| `area:ui`      | `#c5def5` | UI / design changes            |

## Priority labels

| Label              | Color   | Description            |
| ------------------ | ------- | ---------------------- |
| `priority:must`    | `#b60205` | Must have for MVP    |
| `priority:should`  | `#e4e669` | Should have          |
| `priority:could`   | `#cfd3d7` | Nice to have         |
